/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/prefix_scan.cu.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/gc_content.cu.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/homopolymer.cu.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/motif_match.cu.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/entropy.cu.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/src/pipeline.cu.o CMakeFiles/dna_pipeline_parallel.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o dna_pipeline_parallel   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
